name: vibin
description: Session, GitHub review, and CI workflow skills for quick push, session documentation, PR comments, and CI debugging.

paperless_url.title: Paperless URL
paperless_url.description: Base URL of the Paperless-ngx instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

paperless_api_token.title: Paperless API Token
paperless_api_token.description: Paperless-ngx API token used in the Authorization: Token header.

interface.shortDescription: Session, GitHub review, CI, and agent workflow utilities.
interface.longDescription: Vibin bundles session documentation, quick-push, GitHub PR review, CI debugging, Windows VM, screenshot, clipboard, and homelab workflow skills.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibin to quick-push this change.
Use Vibin to address PR review comments.
